pages.text_excerpt: About Yvette - Yvette Cooper MP - Yvette Cooper MP Skip to main content Yvette Cooper MP Labour MP for Pontefract, Castleford, Knottingley & Altofts and Foreign Secretary Join Get Involved Donate About Yvette Contact Latest News Surveys Your views More Menu About Yvette Yvette Cooper MP Yvette Cooper has served as the Member of Parliament for Pontefract, Castleford and Knottingley since 1997, working closely with local communities across the Five Towns to represent coalfield communities and engage on issues such as jobs, public services, and public safety. Much of her constituency work has centred on engaging with residents, holding surgeries, visiting local groups, and supporting thousands of people through casework across a wide range of issues. If you live in the Pontefract, Castleford and Knottingley constituency, you can contact Yvette here . Alongside her constituency responsibilities, Yvette has held a number of Government roles. She has represented Britain on the world stage as Foreign Secretary, promoting British industries and working for peace and fairness globally. She also served as Home Secretary, where she led the fight to restore neighbourhood policing after 14 years of Conservative cuts. During the last Labour Government, Yvette held a range of ministerial roles, including responsibility for rolling out Sure Start children’s centres, supporting families across Britain. pages.text_excerpt: Contact - Yvette Cooper MP - Yvette Cooper MP Skip to main content Yvette Cooper MP Labour MP for Pontefract, Castleford, Knottingley & Altofts and Foreign Secretary Join Get Involved Donate About Yvette Contact Latest News Surveys Your views More Menu Contact Contact Yvette Cooper Pontefract, Castleford, Knottingley and Altofts Yvette is always available to help residents of Altofts, Airedale, Knottingley, Castleford and Pontefract. Get in touch below or email CooperY@parliament.uk . If you live in the Pontefract, Castleford, Knottingley or Altofts constituency, Yvette’s team will be in touch as soon as possible. Not in Yvette Cooper’s constituency? If you are contacting Yvette and you are not in the Pontefract, Castleford, Knottingley or Altofts constituency, please contact your own Member of Parliament. Due to strict Parliamentary protocols, only your own Member of Parliament can represent you. You can find them here: Find your MP Foreign Secretary If you are contacting Yvette as Foreign Secretary, then please email fcdo.correspondence@fcdo.gov.uk . Only residents of Pontefract, Castleford, Knottingley and Altofts messages can be responded through this website. Get in touch with Yvette Name (Required) First Last House Number/Name Street name Town Postcode Email (Required) Phone Number Send a message to Yvette (Required) What can Yvette help you with? Consent By filling in this form, I agree that my details can be used by Yvette Cooper / the Labour Party. They may communicate occasionally with the latest news on this or other campaigns. We will not share your details with anyone else but if you prefer not to be contacted please email: yvette@yvettecooper.com to be removed from this list. I agree to the privacy policy. pages.text_excerpt: Surveys - Yvette Cooper MP - Yvette Cooper MP Skip to main content Yvette Cooper MP Labour MP for Pontefract, Castleford, Knottingley & Altofts and Foreign Secretary Join Get Involved Donate About Yvette Contact Latest News Surveys Your views More Menu Surveys Yvette’s primary role as your MP is to represent the views of local residents. To do this, she regularly runs surveys on key local concerns — such as experiences of crime across the Five Towns, waiting times at Pontefract and Pinderfields Hospitals, and community campaigns like holding Yorkshire Water accountable for the sewage discharged into the River Aire. Fill out one of the surveys below. If there is not a survey on an issue you would like to raise with Yvette, please do not hesitate to message Yvette directly here . Let me know what matters to you See more Water Survey Surveys Family Survey Surveys Bus Survey Surveys Defending Britain – Defence Spending Surveys Yvette’s Local Crime Survey Surveys What do you think of local NHS services?
